texto: Physicians, patients, and ethicists must also understand that acknowledging abuse and encouraging African Americans to participate in research are compatible goals. History and today's deplorable African American health profile tell us clearly that black Americans need both more research and more vigilance.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Harriet A. Washington sobre temas ligados a tempo. A afirmação “Physicians, patients, and ethicists must also understand that acknowledging abuse and encouraging…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, medicine, social-justice, útil em momentos de social-justice.
